name: China Merchants Fengtai Flxbl Alloc(LOF)
summary: China Merchants Fengtai Flxbl Alloc(LOF) is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF) that employs a flexible asset allocation strategy. The fund aims to achieve capital appreciation by dynamically adjusting its asset allocation based on market conditions and investment opportunities. It is managed by China Merchants Fund Management Co., Ltd., headquartered in China.
